name: DW4 Remnants Cleanup - 1.0.25-SNAPSHOT
description: Scan and clean up old Dropwizard 4.x era remnants after upgrade to DW 5.0.1 / 1.0.25-SNAPSHOT

entries.summary: Completed scan for DW 4.x era remnants. Found 4 categories of leftovers.
entries.detail:
1. cloud-sdk-aws/effective-pom.xml — stale generated file from version 1.0.22-SNAPSHOT showing dropwizard.version=4.0.16
2. Root pom.xml line 194 — comment referencing "Dropwizard 4.0.10"
3. javax.xml.bind JAXB deps (root + commons pom.xml) — no Java code uses javax.xml.bind anywhere, was needed for DW4-era Jersey
4. javax.activation-api in commons — no Java code in commons uses it; cloud-sdk-aws uses it but gets it transitively from javax.mail:1.6.2

entries.summary: Removed hardcoded DW 4.0.10 dep and fixed stale comment
entries.detail:
1. Removed hardcoded dropwizard-core:4.0.10 from cloud-sdk-aws/pom.xml (lines 216-220). The duplicate version-less declaration at line 257 correctly inherits 5.0.1 from root dependencyManagement.
2. Fixed stale comment in root pom.xml referencing "Dropwizard 4.0.10" → "Dropwizard 5.0.1"

entries.summary: Pushed 1.0.25-SNAPSHOT with DW4 cleanup and aws-java-sdk-core fix to remote
entries.detail: Committed 08e1627 and pushed to remote. All 4 core modules verified and installed: cloud-sdk-api, dynamo-integration-test, cloud-sdk-aws, commons.
